tagline: Petaluma handyman for the jobs on your list
seoDescription: Weekend Warriors Handyman — a Petaluma, CA handyman service handling home repairs and small projects like TV mounting, door repair, deck refinishing and cabinet work. Trusted by Petaluma homeowners with 20 reviews.
heroHeading: Your Petaluma handyman, project by project
heroSubheading: Weekend Warriors Handyman tackles the home-repair list Petaluma homeowners keep putting off — TV mounting, door and baseboard repair, deck refinishing, cabinets and more, done dependably by a local you can call again.
highlights: Home repairs & small projects of all kinds
TV mounting, door & baseboard repair, deck refinishing
aboutBody: Weekend Warriors Handyman is a local handyman service in Petaluma, handling the everyday home repairs and small projects that pile up on a homeowner's to-do list — from mounting a TV and fixing a sticking door to refinishing a deck or installing cabinets and baseboards.

Customers describe the owner as the kind of handyman you keep on call — many say they have used him since moving into their homes and recommend him without hesitation. The business has earned 20 reviews from Petaluma-area clients.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Door repair, baseboard installation and the everyday fixes that keep a home in good shape.

services.title: TV Mounting
services.description: Clean, secure TV mounting so your screen sits right and the wires stay tidy.

services.title: Deck Refinishing
services.description: Refinishing and refreshing decks to protect the wood and restore the look.

services.title: Cabinets & Closet Doors
services.description: Installing kitchen cabinets and closet doors for a tidier, more functional home.

testimonials.quote: We've used him since we moved into our house and can honestly say he's the best handyman out there.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Petaluma

notes: Verified via web research. Website status: BAD/BROKEN — listings reference weekendwarriorshandyman.com but that domain does NOT resolve (NXDOMAIN); a thin Facebook page exists (facebook.com/weekendwarriorllc). Qualifies as a 'broken/dead website' target. Trust signal = 20 reviews on Yelp (Yelp listing title 'Weekend Warriors Handyman — 20 Reviews — Petaluma, California'); exact star number could NOT be confirmed (yelp.com 403s) so no star figure is stated — review count only. Phone (707) 787-5005; Petaluma 94952 (city only, no street address published). Owner referred to as 'Paul' across reviews; confirm name before personalizing. No CSLB license found — plausible since CA handyman work under the $500 threshold needs no license; do NOT assert any license. 'Established 2007' appeared in a directory snippet but is unconfirmed → 'established' left empty. Hours (daily 9–5) from directory/Yelp snippets, reasonably consistent but not independently confirmed beyond Yelp. Photo-less build. Testimonial condensed honestly from a real review snippet.
